329 GG0170B3_SIT_LYNG_END_CD GG0170B3_SIT_LYNG_END_CD GG0170B3 Discharge Performance Sit to Lying Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to go from a sitting position on the side of bed to lying flat on the bed at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to go from a sitting position on the side of bed to lying flat
